patterns.name: Hardcoded credentials
patterns.description: Database password or API key hardcoded in source file
patterns.fix: Move credentials to environment variables using @Value("${property.name}")

patterns.name: Empty catch block
patterns.fix: Log the exception or rethrow with context: log.error("Failed: {}", e.getMessage(), e)
patterns.resource: Effective Java — Item 77: Don't ignore exceptions

patterns.name: No test files found
patterns.description: Zero test classes detected in the project
patterns.fix: Write unit tests using JUnit 5 + Mockito for your service layer

patterns.name: Missing input validation
patterns.description: Controller methods accepting request bodies without @Valid annotation
patterns.fix: Add @Valid to @RequestBody parameters and use Bean Validation annotations

patterns.name: Missing @Transactional on multi-step operations
patterns.description: Service methods performing multiple DB operations without transaction
patterns.fix: Add @Transactional to service methods that perform multiple database operations

patterns.name: Missing Javadoc on public methods
patterns.fix: Add Javadoc to public methods: /** @param x description @return description */

patterns.name: Non-standard HTTP status codes
patterns.description: Endpoints returning 200 for error cases instead of proper 4xx/5xx
